channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Google Cloud Outage In India As 3rd-Party Data Centre Fire Triggers Shutdown

media:content.media:description: Google Cloud did not say when the fire occurred.

item.description: The cloud-computing unit said the fire led to an emergency power shutdown at the facility, isolating a local point of presence in Delhi.
item.content:encoded: The cloud-computing unit said the fire led to an emergency power shutdown at the facility, isolating a local point of presence in Delhi.

item.title: US Iran War News LIVE: Iran’s FM Araghchi Discusses US Attacks With Saudi, Turkey

media:content.media:description: US Israel Iran War LIVE Updates

item.title: Meet Indian-Origin Man Behind Drone Boat That Rescued US Pilots From Hormuz

media:content.media:description: Altekar is a highly accomplished perception engineer with expertise in the field of autonomous systems

item.description: Vibhav Altekar is a highly accomplished perception engineer with expertise in the field of autonomous systems and maritime technology.
item.content:encoded: Vibhav Altekar is a highly accomplished perception engineer with expertise in the field of autonomous systems and maritime technology.

item.title: World Witnessed Second-Hottest May On Record: EU's Climate Monitor

media:content.media:description: The average sea surface temperature was also the second highest on record.

item.description: Records were broken in Britain, France, Ireland and Portugal last month as a "heat dome" of warm air from northern Africa pushed temperatures well above normal levels across western Europe.
item.content:encoded: Records were broken in Britain, France, Ireland and Portugal last month as a "heat dome" of warm air from northern Africa pushed temperatures well above normal levels across western Europe.

item.title: "Epstein Was A Monster, Master Manipulator": What His Ex-Aide Told Congress

media:content.media:description: Jeffrey Epstein died in a New York jail while awaiting trial.

item.description: Groff described Epstein as a "master manipulator" who kept his criminal activities hidden from those working closely with him.
item.content:encoded: Groff described Epstein as a "master manipulator" who kept his criminal activities hidden from those working closely with him.

item.title: US Man Loses Rs 3.7 Crore In Retirement Savings After Responding To Phishing Mail

media:content.media:description: Jeffrey Maas lost Rs 3.7 crore after scammers used fake emails and phone calls to defraud him.

item.description: A 77-year-old US man lost Rs 3.7 crore ($390,000) in a phishing scam involving fake PayPal refund and gold purchase.
item.content:encoded: A 77-year-old US man lost Rs 3.7 crore ($390,000) in a phishing scam involving fake PayPal refund and gold purchase.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | America Has Never, Ever Looked This Humiliated: The Story Of A Superpower's Fall
item.description: America's position was not this weak until recently; in fact, it was riding high. Then it chose to make all the wrong choices, and turned into a 'superpower' no one takes seriously anymore.
item.content:encoded: America's position was not this weak until recently; in fact, it was riding high. Then it chose to make all the wrong choices, and turned into a 'superpower' no one takes seriously anymore.

item.title: 12 Killed, 9 Injured In Mass Shooting In South Africa's Johannesburg

media:content.media:description: The motive for the attack is not known. (Representational image)

item.title: Trump Family Made $500 Million In Crypto Deal Before Firm's Collapse Hit Investors

media:content.media:description: Before Trump-linked crypto deal was announced in August, shares of Alt5 Sigma were trading at $8.97 each

item.description: Less than a year after the deal was celebrated at the Nasdaq stock exchange by Donald Trump Jr. and Eric Trump, AI Financial Corp. saw its share price plunge by more than 90 percent.
item.content:encoded: Less than a year after the deal was celebrated at the Nasdaq stock exchange by Donald Trump Jr. and Eric Trump, AI Financial Corp. saw its share price plunge by more than 90 percent.

item.title: Palantir To Challenge London Mayor Sadiq Khan Over Scrapped 50 Million Euros Police Deal

media:content.media:description: The disagreement comes at a time when Palantir is facing increasing scrutiny in the UK

item.description: Sadiq Khan's office says the procurement process failed to demonstrate value for money and did not follow required procedures
item.content:encoded: Sadiq Khan's office says the procurement process failed to demonstrate value for money and did not follow required procedures

item.title: Indian-Origin Cop Killed In Canada After 18-Year-Old Man Hit Him With Car

media:content.media:description: Bali was assigned to the Dufferin detachment in southern Ontario

item.description: The Ontario Provincial Police (OPP) have arrested an 18-year-old man for the first-degree murder of Bali. The accused has been charged with two counts each of flight from police and dangerous driving.
item.content:encoded: The Ontario Provincial Police (OPP) have arrested an 18-year-old man for the first-degree murder of Bali. The accused has been charged with two counts each of flight from police and dangerous driving.

item.title: Uranium Ban To Site Closures: What US Wants From Iran In Nuclear Talks

media:content.media:description: Negotiators have narrowed down the talks to four major nuclear issues

item.description: If Iran accepts this demand, along with the other three conditions being discussed, it would be a much stricter arrangement than the nuclear deal reached in 2015.
item.content:encoded: If Iran accepts this demand, along with the other three conditions being discussed, it would be a much stricter arrangement than the nuclear deal reached in 2015.

item.title: Death Count In 7.8 Magnitude Philippines Earthquake Rises To 46

media:content.media:description: Most of the additional dead were from Davao Occidental province.

item.description: The 7.8-magnitude tremor just off the coast of Mindanao on Monday brought down buildings, triggered landslides and set off tsunami warnings across a swathe of the southern island.
item.content:encoded: The 7.8-magnitude tremor just off the coast of Mindanao on Monday brought down buildings, triggered landslides and set off tsunami warnings across a swathe of the southern island.

item.title: Carriage Horse Tragically Dies In Front Of Crowd In New York's Central Park As Ban Push Intensifies

media:content.media:description: Deniz, a carriage horse, collapsed and died during a ride in Central Park, NYC.

item.description: A 16-year-old carriage horse collapsed and died 10 minutes later in front of a traumatised crowd in New York's Central Park.
item.content:encoded: A 16-year-old carriage horse collapsed and died 10 minutes later in front of a traumatised crowd in New York's Central Park.

item.title: "Disproportionate, Unlawful": Global Rights Bodies On Crackdown In PoK
11 Children Killed In Sleep In Pak Strikes On Afghanistan, Claim Taliban

media:content.media:description: The overnight attacks happened while the victims were asleep

item.description: The latest strikes are the deadliest in weeks and follow a period of relative calm at the border after conflict between the two countries erupted in late February, when escalation saw fierce fighting along the frontier and unprecedented Pakistani air
item.content:encoded: The latest strikes are the deadliest in weeks and follow a period of relative calm at the border after conflict between the two countries erupted in late February, when escalation saw fierce fighting along the frontier and unprecedented Pakistani air

item.title: Iran Targets F-35 Hangars, US Bases After Strikes Over Apache Downing

media:content.media:description: Fars news agency reported that two water tanks in the Bemani district of Sirik were also struck

item.description: Following the new wave of attacks, Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said the US had chosen to "test" Tehran's "determination" and the Iranian armed forces would "leave no attack or threat unanswered".
item.content:encoded: Following the new wave of attacks, Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said the US had chosen to "test" Tehran's "determination" and the Iranian armed forces would "leave no attack or threat unanswered".

item.title: Donald Trump Breaks On Being Booed At NBA Finals Game 3: “Mostly Cheers”

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump has downplayed the jeering he faced at the NBA finals.

item.description: Donald Trump attended the NBA Finals with his granddaughter Kai, special envoy Steve Witkoff and Madison Square Garden CEO James Dolan.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump attended the NBA Finals with his granddaughter Kai, special envoy Steve Witkoff and Madison Square Garden CEO James Dolan.

item.title: Meet NASA's Artemis III Crew: A Test Pilot, Italian, Record-Holder, First-Timer

media:content.media:description: The Artemis III mission launch is due in 2027.

item.description: US astronauts Andre Douglas, Frank Rubio and Randy Bresnik and Italian astronaut Luca Parmitano of the European Space Agency will be the crew for Artemis III.
item.content:encoded: US astronauts Andre Douglas, Frank Rubio and Randy Bresnik and Italian astronaut Luca Parmitano of the European Space Agency will be the crew for Artemis III.

item.title: A Woman In-Charge Of UN? Candidates Say "After 80 Years, About Time"

media:content.media:description: Many countries are advocating for a woman to head the UN for the first time.

item.description: Michelle Bachelet of Chile, Rebeca Grynspan of Costa Rica and Maria Fernanda Espinosa of Ecuador are all standing to succeed Antonio Guterres.
item.content:encoded: Michelle Bachelet of Chile, Rebeca Grynspan of Costa Rica and Maria Fernanda Espinosa of Ecuador are all standing to succeed Antonio Guterres.
